seo.title: Yelan Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Yelan build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Aqua Simulacra, Favonius Warbow), optimal artifacts (Emblem of Severed Fate), team compositions (Double Hydro, Hyperbloom), and rotation guide.

intro: Yelan is a top-tier Hydro sub-DPS: off-field coordinated Hydro attacks that trigger on normal attacks, massive personal DMG that scales with HP, and a ramping DMG buff for the active character. She is basically a 5-star Xingqiu with more damage and slightly less Hydro application. This guide covers everything you need to build her optimally in v4.8.
weapon_bottom_line: Aqua Simulacra is BiS — massive CRIT DMG and HP% bonus. Favonius Warbow solves all energy problems. Use Favonius unless you have C1 or enough ER from artifacts.

weapons.name: Aqua Simulacra
weapons.notes: Signature. Massive CRIT DMG + HP% + DMG bonus. Perfect synergy.

weapons.name: Favonius Warbow
weapons.notes: Best F2P. ER main stat + energy particles. Solves ER needs completely.

weapons.name: Sacrificial Bow
weapons.notes: Extra E charge = more particles + more DMG. Good for C0.

weapons.name: The Stringless
weapons.notes: Skill + burst DMG bonus. Use in reaction teams (vape).

artifact_alt: 2pc HP% + 2pc Hydro DMG (while farming Emblem). 4pc Emblem is the goal for most builds.

main_stats.sands_note: HP% best for damage. ER% if below 180% (solo Hydro needs 200%+).
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Hydro DMG. HP% goblet only with Aqua + very high HP subs.

sub_priority: Energy Recharge (to 180-200% — C1 lowers this to ~160%)
CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG (1:2 ratio — she needs both)
HP% (more damage — Yelan scales entirely off HP)
Flat HP (minor boost — less efficient than HP%)

teams.name: Team 1: Double Hydro Hu Tao
teams.desc: Hu Tao + Yelan + Xingqiu + Zhongli. Double Hydro resonance (+25% HP) benefits both Yelan and Hu Tao. Massive single-target DMG.

teams.name: Team 2: Hyperbloom Driver
teams.desc: Yelan + Nahida + Kuki/Raiden + Flex. Yelan provides Hydro for bloom seeds. Kuki triggers hyperblooms. High floor damage.

teams.name: Team 3: Mono Hydro
teams.desc: Kokomi + Yelan + Kazuha + Xingqiu. Triple Hydro feeds everyone's energy. Kazuha buffs Hydro DMG. Fun and surprisingly effective.

rotation_code: Zhongli hold E → Yelan E Q → Xingqiu E Q E → Hu Tao E → CA spam (jump/dash cancel) → Q (when HP low)
mistakes: ❌ Building ATK instead of HP. Yelan scales ENTIRELY on HP. ATK does literally nothing for her.
❌ Too little ER. Solo Hydro Yelan needs 200%+ ER. Below 180%, burst won't be up. Use Favonius Warbow or an ER sands.
❌ Leveling NA. Yelan's burst triggers off anyone's NA — she never uses her own normal attacks as a sub-DPS.
❌ Using her as solo Hydro in energy-hungry teams. Yelan needs either C1, Sac Bow, or Fav Bow to battery herself solo. Otherwise pair with Xingqiu.

artifact_why: 4-Piece Emblem of Severed Fate is the optimal set for Yelan.
